LSE-MS6-L3-1400P-MSVPA-TSP-IMR-02 • Grade 6 • Music — Elements and Expressive Qualities Related to Structure

The Slow Ending

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
Why did the boy add a slow ending to the song?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Analyze the relationship the boy establishes between the slow speed of the ending and what he says about his grandma's voice after leaving home. Explain how he uses one to show something about the other.
